transcripts.transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling Pain Management & Neurology Clinic, this is Maria. How can I help you today?
Caller: Hi, I need to schedule a follow-up appointment with Dr. Patel.
Agent: Of course! Let me pull up Dr. Patel's availability. Can I have your date of birth to locate your file?
Caller: Sure, it's March 15, 1982.
Agent: Thank you. I see your file here. Dr. Patel has openings next Tuesday at 10 AM and Thursday at 2 PM. Which works better for you?
Caller: Tuesday at 10 works great.
Agent: Perfect, I've booked you for Tuesday, April 1st at 10 AM with Dr. Patel at our Riverside location. You'll get a confirmation text shortly. Is there anything else I can help with?
Caller: No, that's all. Thank you!
Agent: You're welcome! Have a great day.

Agent: Pain Management Clinic, James speaking.
Caller: Hi, I'm calling about my mother, Linda Brooks. I need to know what medications she's currently on.
Agent: Sure, let me look that up. OK so Linda Brooks, date of birth June 5th 1951, she's currently prescribed Oxycodone 10mg twice daily and Gabapentin 300mg three times daily.
Caller: Great, thank you so much.
Agent: No problem! Is there anything else?
Caller: No, that's it.
Agent: Have a good day!

Agent: Thank you for calling, how can I help?
Caller: Sorry, wrong number.
Agent: No problem, have a good day.
